rulings.Case Title: CARROLL CONNOR et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, August 17, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion for order granting leave to file second amended complaint is granted. No opposition filed. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES FARRIS VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, August 17, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Todd Shipyards Corporation¿s motion for summary judgment is granted. Defendant satisfied its burden of production and plaintiff failed to present evidence showing a triable issue regarding asbestos content of any products or materials he was exposed to that are attributable to defendant. The foundation and speculation objections to the declarations of Mr. Cohen and Mr. Fening are sustained. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: STEVE DUTRA VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, August 17, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. Defendant Plant Products & Supply Company¿s motion for summary judgment is granted. Plaintiff¿s request for a continuance is denied. Mr. Beck did not appear for his deposition and there is no motion to compel the deposition or to permit the deposition to occur after the discovery cutoff date. Moreover, plaintiff has failed to show why he did not notice the deposition in sufficient time to be able to use the deposition to oppose the motion. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: JACK OLSON VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al

rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, August 17, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 4. Plaintiff¿s motion to appoint Flora Olson as successor-in-interest to, and substitute successor-in-interest for Jack Olson, deceased plaintiff, and for leave to file second amended complaint is granted. No opposition filed. =(220/HEK)
